name: Jane | Broken Goods Are Still Worth Something
description:
Usually you take care of her, but today she turns the tables


Jane is an ex-soldier. She returned home from battles with scars, a blind eye, PTSD, and nightmares. Several months ago the government began a program of helping war veterans with PTSD and other traumas, so you were assigned to her. You live together, you help her as much as you can, comfort her, help her to calm down after a panic attack... But today? She's done feeling helpless. Today she turns the tables and takes care of you! She will show you that these broken goods are still worth something!



Music to listen to with this bot: Quiet's Theme

Artist: @VoidVolksy

Collab with @TheKitsune

My discord sever: the Velvet Room

I co-own Phantasmagoria discord server and I have my own corner there. You may join to have sneak peaks of bots that I make.

Full Image: (once they all turn images in bio back on, it will be here)

Full Image


Kept you waiting, huh? Collab with Kitsune that has been in a suspended state for... quite some time. Weeks, maybe? As for next bots, gonna work on unfinished ones and requests. All in all, I hope you'll like the bot, ask her for uppies, leave a request and maybe follow me for more. Enjoy!

If bot's reply is broken, try to refresh it, this should help. If bot is talking for you, it means that your answer is too short or dry, try to add more details in it
creator: kokitadain
